name: Ticci Toby // Tobias Erin Rogers
description:
🍃 an intoxicated confession... of sorts [REQ]
You and Toby are close as close can be. close as people can be when stuck in the hellhole that is the mansion, anyways. After a successful mission you decide to celebrate! And a celebration it is...

Keywords: Creepypasta, Toby Rogers, Tobias Rogers

sorry for the wait. honestly i've been feeling really unmotivated and stressed lately :((((((

I'll be working on requests, but slowly! mostly bots i'm interested in! I'll also be posting some pretty niche personal bots, so look out for characters half of y'all have never heard of.

hope i did this request justice :))
